CommonError.description: Standardized error response format used across the API.

code.description: Unique numeric error code for programmatic identification.

title.description: Concise, uppercase error identifier (e.g., constant name).

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the error in the primary language (e.g., English).
description.example: User name should not be empty

description2.description: Human-readable explanation in a secondary language (e.g., Chinese).

path.description: Dot-separated path to the invalid field (e.g., 'user.profile.email').

field.description: Name of the invalid field at the current nesting level.

rejectedValue.description: The actual input value that was rejected during validation.

constraint.description: Validation rule(s) that were violated (e.g., 'NOT_NULL', 'SIZE', 'PATTERN'). Multiple rules may be pipe-separated.

tips.description: Actionable suggestion to resolve the error.
tips.example: Price must be a positive number, e.g., 1000.12

domain.description: Business domain or module where the error originated (e.g., 'order', 'payment').

phase.description: The application layer or processing stage where the error was raised. Used for diagnostics and monitoring.

severity.description: The impact level of the error. Helps clients determine urgency and handling strategy.

httpStatus.description: The HTTP status code corresponding to this error, expressed as the enum name (e.g., 'BAD_REQUEST', 'NOT_FOUND'). This typically matches the actual HTTP response status sent by the server.

deprecated.description: Indicates whether this error type is deprecated and may be removed in future versions.

properties.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for additional contextual information. These appear as top-level fields in JSON when serialized via Jackson's @JsonAnyGetter.

CommonError.title: (Common)Error

code.description: Response status code: 0 indicates success; non-zero values indicate errors.

message.description: Human-readable message providing additional context about the result.

errors.description: List of error details (omitted if empty)

CommonEmptyResult.description: Minimal API response for operations with no meaningful payload. Contains only a generic 'data' field (often empty or confirmation message).
CommonEmptyResult.title: (Common)Empty Result

schema.description: Pagination parameters for querying a collection of resources.

page.description: Zero-based page index (e.g., 0 for the first page). Must be >= 0.
page.title: Page Index

size.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 20 if unspecified.
size.title: Page Size

sort.description:
Sorting instructions in the format: `property,(asc|desc)`.
Multiple sort criteria may be provided (e.g., `["name,asc", "createdAt,desc"]`).
If direction is omitted, ascending (`asc`) is assumed by default.

schema.title: (Common)Page Request Parameters
